24.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

24.gl: to puncture, literally (to perforate, with more or less violence) or figuratively (to specify, designate, libel)
24.kj: appoint, blaspheme, bore, curse, express, with holes, name, pierce, strike through.

24.gl: a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose)
